svg.title: Zalyx Agent Society — Architecture (H0: Hack the Zero Stack)
svg.desc: Five-agent underwriting pipeline: Vercel React frontend → Express.js API (SSE) → Agent Orchestrator → five specialized agents → Amazon Bedrock (Nova Pro, Converse API, tool use) + Amazon DynamoDB (two tables, decision-index GSI) + MCP Server (three tools)
svg.text: Track 2: Monetizable B2B App · H0: Hack the Zero Stack 2026
Stage 4 skip on high risk · Emits SSE events
Conditional Debate — fires when health > 55 AND risk > 35
Business Agent rebuts ② → Risk Agent issues final verdict ③c → DebateLedger records every claim + resolution type
Structured JSON via tool call arguments
agents/baseline-agent.ts · 1 Bedrock call · no tool use · no debate
Result shown side-by-side · decisionDelta in every report
SSE streaming (real-time agent events to Vercel UI)
8 Bedrock calls + 3 MCP calls per underwriting run
AI: Amazon Bedrock (amazon.nova-pro-v1:0) · Converse API · Tool Use | DB: Amazon DynamoDB · 2 tables · PAY_PER_REQUEST · decision-index GSI
Frontend: React + Vite → Vercel | MCP: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.29 · stdio · 3 tools | Backend: Node.js · Express · TypeScript
